chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 491 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on statement dated 12.05.2024 2. For hearing of CMA No.2085/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 05-11-2025 None present for the Petitioner Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for Respondent No.6 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Abdul Qayoom Kandhir, Secretary, BISE, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< In compliance of order dated 27-04-2023, learned counsel for Respondent No.6 / Secretary, BISE, Sukkur files a statement along with certain documents, which is taken on record. Perusal of record reflects that on 12-05-2023, the Petitioner himself has filed a statement stating that his grievance has now been redressed, therefore, he withdraws the instant Petition. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
